title: Morgan’s Rule Turns Violent
description: On pages 16–19, this part resolves the Shells Town conflict and separates Coby’s Marine dream from Luffy and Zoro’s pirate path.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be a navy officer!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: MANY OF MY FELLOW SAILORS HAVE BEEN KILLED BY PIRATES...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't take being a sailor lightly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: THAT WAS SOME PRETTY BAD ACTING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wouldn't be surprised if they saw through it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: IT'S ALL UP TO KOBY, NOW. HE'LL GET IN SOMEHOW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WELL, IT'S A GOOD TIME TO BE LEAVING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: EVERYBODY HATES US... THAT'S THE WAY PIRATES SHOULD LEAVE A TOWN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thank you very much, Cap'n Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll never forget all you did for me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THIS IS A NEW ONE. A PIRATE BEING SALUTED BY THE MANAY!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You've got some good friends, sailor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: now, it's against REGULATIONS to salute pirates like we just did.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As punishment, we won't get any dinner for one week!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy and his first crewman (the former, infamous, demonic Pirate Hunter Zolo) set sail...

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
